stories.title: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Can the Canes strike b...
stories.summary: Here are the top players and trends to know with the Golden Knights up 1-0 on the Hurricanes.

stories.title: Fans get lifetime bans for NBA Finals selfie quest...
stories.summary: Two fans involved in a selfie-seeking incident during Game 1 of the NBA Finals on Wednesday night have been given lifetime bans from all NBA arenas, a league spokesperson said Thursday.

stories.title: Sources: NBA investigating Brunson-fan incident
stories.summary: The NBA is investigating an interaction between Knicks star Jalen Brunson and courtside fans late in the fourth quarter of Game 1 of the NBA Finals, sources confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: Sources: Pack, WR Watson reach $110.5M deal
stories.summary: Wide receiver Christian Watson and the Packers reached agreement Thursday on a four-year, $110.5 million contract extension that includes a $31 million signing bonus, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

stories.title: Trump to attend NBA Finals Game 3 in New York
stories.summary: President Trump said Thursday that he has accepted an invitation from New York Knicks owner James Dolan to attend an NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden next week.
